name: Red Devil Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the hard-boiled eggs in half lengthwise and scoop out the yolks.
2. Mash one egg white (from two halves) with a fork until crumbly.
3. Add the scooped-out yolks to the mashed egg whites and mash well.
4. Mix in the chopped onion, jalapenos, their juice, cumin, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
5. Stir in the sour cream until everything is combined.
6. Fill each egg white half with the yolk mixture.
7. Sprinkle chili powder or cayenne pepper on top for added heat.
